items.definition_en: A letter is a written message sent to someone.
items.example_en: I wrote a letter to my friend yesterday.

items.definition_en: A note is a short written message.
items.example_en: She left a note on the table for him.

items.definition_en: A postcard is a card sent with a message on one side.
items.example_en: I sent a postcard from my holiday.

items.definition_en: A message is written or spoken information sent to someone.
items.example_en: I got a message from my brother.

items.definition_en: An email is an electronic letter sent by computer.
items.example_en: He checks his email every morning.

items.definition_en: An invitation is a written request to come to an event.
items.example_en: She sent out the wedding invitation last week.

items.definition_en: A reply is a written answer to a letter or message.
items.example_en: He wrote a reply to her letter.

items.definition_en: Post is letters and parcels sent by mail.
items.example_en: The post arrived late today.

items.definition_en: A greeting card is a card with a message for a special occasion.
items.example_en: I bought a greeting card for her birthday.

items.definition_en: A report is a written account about something.
items.example_en: She finished writing her school report.

items.definition_en: An application is a written request for something.
items.example_en: He filled out a job application.

items.definition_en: A form is a paper with spaces to write information.
items.example_en: Please fill in this registration form.

items.definition_en: A reminder is a short message to help you remember.
items.example_en: She sent me a reminder about the meeting.

items.definition_en: A contract is a written agreement between people.
items.example_en: He signed the new work contract today.

items.definition_en: A list is a series of items written down.
items.example_en: She wrote a shopping list.

items.definition_en: A diary is a book to write about daily events.
items.example_en: He writes in his diary every night.

items.definition_en: A document is a written paper with information.
items.example_en: She showed me the document from the office.

items.definition_en: An article is a written piece in a magazine or newspaper.
items.example_en: He read an article about travel.

items.definition_en: An announcement is an official written notice.
items.example_en: The announcement was posted on the wall.

items.definition_en: A reminder note is a small message to help remember something.
items.example_en: He put a reminder note on his fridge.
